# Description

Wireless-Redstone is a simple mod to transmit a redstone signal wirelessly. This is especially convenient for large redstone techniques or long distances. The signal is also transmitted in non-loaded chunks!

# Features

* transmit a wireless redstone signal
* works also in non-loaded chunks
* with remote activator you can toggle redstone output from everywhere
* with multiemitter you can transmit a wireless signal to multiple acceptors

## How to use

With the WLR Linker you can link a WLR Acceptor with a WLR Emitter. To do this, first right-click on the WLR Acceptor and then on the corresponding WLR Emitter. The emitter is used to send an incoming Redstone signal to the acceptor, which then outputs the signal.
